---
title: Diagram Gallery
---

# UIAO Governance Diagrams

| Diagram | Description |
|---|---|
| [Master Governance Hierarchy](./governance-hierarchy.qmd) | Full hierarchical taxonomy A through E |
| [Adapter Plane](./adapter-plane.qmd) | Appendix A dependencies |
| [Truth Fabric](./truth-fabric.qmd) | Appendix B dependencies |
| [Drift Fabric](./drift-fabric.qmd) | Appendix C dependencies |
| [Evidence Fabric](./evidence-fabric.qmd) | Appendix D dependencies |
| [Governance Plane](./governance-plane.qmd) | Appendix E dependencies |

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
